1.title: Bytes received
1.query:
timeseries bytes_rx = avg(dt.process.nettracer.bytes_rx),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(bytes_rx) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Bytes transmitted
2.query:
timeseries bytes_tx = avg(dt.process.nettracer.bytes_tx),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(bytes_tx) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Retransmitted packets
3.query:
timeseries pkts_retr = avg(dt.process.nettracer.pkts_retr),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(pkts_retr) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Packets received
4.query:
timeseries pkts_rx = avg(dt.process.nettracer.pkts_rx),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(pkts_rx) desc
| limit 20

5.title: Packets transmitted
5.query:
timeseries pkts_tx = avg(dt.process.nettracer.pkts_tx),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(pkts_tx) desc
| limit 20

6.title: Round trip time
6.query:
timeseries rtt = avg(dt.process.nettracer.rtt),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(rtt) desc
| limit 20
